algebraic_discrepancy: JAX acoustic_substep_core fed perturbation theta directly into advance_mu_t and only applied the WRF mass-coupled projection after the update. WRF mass-couples t_2 before advance_mu_t and decouples it with the saved pre-coupled t_2 afterward.

fortran_reference.contract_path_missing_note: external/wrf/dyn_em/module_small_step_em.F was absent; used the stable WRF source path recorded in PROJECT_PLAN.md.

matched_hypothesis: H1 mass-coupled theta mismatch; H3 flux source was also corrected to WRF t_1 in mu_t_advance.py.
